basics.name: Neil Dahlke
basics.label: Deployed Engineering Leader
basics.summary: Engineering leader with 10+ years in software development, solutions engineering, and field leadership across AI, infrastructure, and data. Won Solutions Engineer of the Year and President's Club multiple times as an individual contributor, then founded and built the West Deployed Engineering team at LangChain. Technical depth spans AI/ML frameworks, cloud infrastructure, and distributed systems, with a history of staying close to customers and feeding field insights directly into product decisions.

highlights: Lead the West Deployed Engineering team from its founding, including all hiring, onboarding, and process development.
Manage a portfolio of strategic accounts as a certified technical resource, focused on adoption, expansion, and renewals.
Run quarterly business reviews across all regions to connect customer engineering teams to business goals.
Maintain dashboards and automations to track OKRs across the Deployed Engineering organization, improving business quality and visibility.
Contribute to pricing strategy and maintain forecasting models to support revenue planning.
Manage the feature request and feedback process between field engineers and product teams, driving faster turnaround on key customer requests.
Develop and run onboarding programs, enablement docs, and technical tooling to get new hires productive faster.
Educated customers and technical stakeholders on Temporal through presentations, whiteboarding sessions, and technical documentation.
Worked with Account Executives and sales teams on account strategy, opportunity qualification, scoping, and sizing.
Positioned Temporal against competing technologies and architectural approaches in a still-developing market.
Built application prototypes and provided hands-on support across Java, Golang, TypeScript, Python, C#, and PHP.
Advised engineering teams on security, scalability, reliability, cost, and maintainability.
Maintained relationships with technical decision-makers through post-sales implementation.

work.position: Sr. Staff Solutions Engineer, Global (Vault SME Leader)
highlights: Promoted to Sr. Staff based on consistent quota overachievement, Vault expertise, and contributions across the broader organization.
Handled pre-sales (discovery, value prop, architectural design) for new products and post-sales (onboarding, growth, expansion) for existing ones.
Served as the escalation point and product subject matter expert for practitioners and executives across Fortune 50 accounts.
Triaged all Vault field requests and embedded with the product team on roadmap direction, maintaining a feedback loop between field, engineering, and go-to-market.
Designed training, demos, workshops, and competitive analysis documentation for customers and the sales team.
Selected for the Top Financials program, working with HashiCorp's most strategic financial services accounts.

work.position: Staff Solutions Engineer, West North America
highlights: Promoted from Senior to Staff Solutions Engineer in the West region based on quota attainment and team contributions.
Led pre-sales activities across Fortune 500 accounts, including discovery, value prop, architectural design, and working directly with executive decision-makers.
Worked across the full HashiCorp product suite, including Terraform, Vault, Consul, Nomad, and Boundary.
Mentored new Solutions Engineers and helped build out demo frameworks and team enablement.
Earned SE of the Quarter and SE of the Year recognition in FY20, consistently exceeding quota throughout the West region tenure.

work.position: Senior Solutions Engineer, West North America (Team Lead)
highlights: Led technical evaluations with enterprise customers including Goldman Sachs, Pinterest, and Uber, demonstrating SingleStore's real-time analytics capabilities.
Designed and architected database solutions for customer workloads, including schema optimization, query tuning, and performance benchmarking.
Delivered technical presentations and product demonstrations to C-level executives and engineering teams at Fortune 500 companies.
Worked with sales teams on technical proposals, RFP responses, and custom solution architectures.
Built reusable demos, tools, and technical collateral to speed up the sales process and enable the broader team.
Partnered with Account Executives on new logo acquisition and account expansion across Fortune 100 accounts, serving as the primary technical resource throughout the sales cycle.
Led technical evaluations including query tuning, load testing, and competitive benchmarking against Oracle, SQL Server, Postgres, Snowflake, and other data platforms.
Relayed customer requirements and field feedback to Product and Engineering to influence the roadmap.
Earned SE of the Year (Global) recognition, consistently exceeding quota across the West region.
Built frontend interfaces and data visualization tools for SingleStore's real-time analytics database product.
Developed deep product knowledge working directly alongside the engineering team, which later supported a move into Solutions Engineering.
Translated design mockups and prototypes into large-scale web applications.
Built and maintained frontend features for Globus, a research data management platform used by universities and national labs.
Worked alongside researchers to translate technical requirements into software.

awards.title: SE of the Year, West USA (FY21)
SE of the Quarter, West USA (FY20Q1/Q2/Q3, FY21Q1)
SE of the Year, West USA (FY20)

publications.name: Building Resilient Distributed Systems with Temporal and AWS
Migrating A Lot of State with Python and the Terraform Cloud API
MemSQL, Tableau, and the Democratization of Data
